title: Current Technologies and Future Perspectives in Immunotherapy towards a Clinical Oncology Approach

L2: Comprehensive review of immunotherapy technologies for clinical oncology
Covers checkpoint inhibitors, CAR-T cells, cancer vaccines, and combination strategies
L3: Graphical abstract reviewing current and future immunotherapy technologies in clinical oncology. Covers immune checkpoint inhibitors, CAR-T cell therapy, cancer vaccines, and combination strategies. Published in MDPI Biomedicines. CC BY 4.0.
